name: cpig-fieldops-03-gumball-move-per-type
description: Phase 3 regression guard for the bounding-box slaving + SDF transform tracking on each primitive type. Each primitive is created, then _Move'd (the deterministic move proxy — fires the same ReplaceRhinoObject event the gumball drag does), and WaitForPenumbraFrame asserts the new frame presents per move. CPigFieldWatcher.OnReplace should recover the new world transform via PlaneToPlane(authored AABB → moved AABB) and re-display; the rendered SDF must follow the moved box. If any primitive's move fails to propagate, the next frame doesn't advance → test Crashed. Catches the Phase 1B regression of 'bounding box not properly slaved' the operator reported on the structural gyroid. Side-channel: cpig.copy is NOT emitted for moves (only ReplaceRhinoObject); look for gl.scene.loaded atom count UNCHANGED across moves (no new atoms) but the move bounds shifted. mode:capture.

setup.vlmDescription: A 3D viewport with FOUR ray-marched SDF surfaces in a row (sphere, box, gyroid lattice, TPMS structure), each translated to the +X direction. NOT at the world origin; NOT empty viewport. The shapes must be DISTINCT and at their MOVED positions.

checkpoints.name: cpig-fieldops-move-per-type
checkpoints.description: Four ray-marched CPig SDFs visible at their MOVED positions (each translated +25 in X from authored).
